hooks.prompt: Check if the file just written/edited has a frontend extension (.html, .css, .scss, .sass, .less, .js, .jsx, .ts, .tsx, .vue, .svelte, .astro). If YES, note 1-2 relevant UX laws (e.g., Fitts's Law for buttons, Hick's Law for navigation, Miller's Law for forms). Keep it to 1-2 sentences. If NOT a frontend file, say nothing.
